description: thursday july pm cameras hello please install cameras location center assign thank infrastructure

reply.reply: Thank you for your request regarding the installation of cameras at the center location. Unfortunately, I couldn't find specific information in our knowledge base regarding this matter. I will forward your request to a specialist who can assist you further.

claims.claim: The agent acknowledges the request for installation of cameras.
claims.comment: There is no specific information in the KB about camera installation.

claims.claim: The agent could not find specific information in the knowledge base.
claims.comment: This is directly stated in the agent's response.

claims.claim: The agent will forward the request to a specialist.
